prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年重庆物理类最低位次依次为11623→12251→12526→13384→14988，连续5年持续后移，累计后移约3365名；近3年加速明显，2023至2024年后移858名，2024至2025年后移1604名，2025年基准位次约14988名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为12人，2026年仍为12人，计划连续6年持平，无扩招或缩招信号，供需关系未因计划调整而改变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 天津医科大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第61名→2022年第67名→2023年第67名→2024年第55名→2025年第59名→2026年第60名，排名整体稳定在60名左右，是医科大学中唯一一所211院校，层次认可度高；2026年高考周期声誉文件中无天津医科大学相关记录，近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情或断档事件；抖音学校热度总排名第78位（样本15条视频），评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等，未出现高热关注信号；投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录，报考心理层面未受负面冲击）；但作为211医科大学，临床医学、药学、护理学等为其传统优势方向，对医学类考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续被评为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，护理学被评为「推荐」，医学大类整体报考热度居高不下；重庆市物理类考生数从2021年98954人持续增长至2025年139478人，增幅约41%，2026年全市普通高考总人数约209000人，按近年物理类占比约65.5%估算约13.7万人，考生规模仍处高位，竞争压力不减；省控线方面，重庆物理类本科批从2021年446分降至2025年425分，略有下降，但位次竞争未因分数线降低而缓解；天津医科大学位于天津市，重庆考生属于跨省报考，无本省地域偏好优势；该校在重庆招生计划仅12人，招生规模小，位次波动对少量计划变化较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势（近3年加速）、招生计划连续6年持平、重庆市物理类考生规模持续高位运行、医学类专业社会热度居高不下等因素，2026年该校在重庆物理类的最低录取位次预计在2025年基准14988名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约15188名，区间14688–15688名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 临床医学
- 眼视光医学
- 麻醉学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 药学类（药学、药物制剂、临床药学）
- 医学影像技术
- 医学检验技术
- 预防医学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在14688–15688区间内，建议以二档专业（药学类、医学技术类、预防医学）为主攻方向，一档专业（临床医学5+3、临床医学、眼视光医学、麻醉学）作为冲刺目标，三档护理学作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（14688以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（15688附近）建议以二档为主、护理学保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Chongqing Physics Category were 11623 → 12251 → 12526 → 13384 → 14988, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 3365 places; the acceleration has been significant in the last 3 years, with a shift of 858 places from 2023 to 2024, and 1604 places from 2024 to 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 14988 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 12 students from 2021 to 2025, and remains 12 in 2026, unchanged for 6 consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or reduction, and the supply-demand relationship has not changed due to plan adjustments.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tianjin Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 at 61st → 2022 at 67th → 2023 at 67th → 2024 at 55th → 2025 at 59th → 2026 at 60th, overall stable around 60th, and is the only 211 university among medical schools, with high level recognition; in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, there are no relevant records of Tianjin Medical University in the reputation file, with stable reputation in recent years, no significant negative public opinion or discontinuation events; the overall Douyin school popularity ranking is 78th (sample of 15 videos), rated as 'average', with medium short video exposure, no high attention signals; there are also no records of discontinuation in the admission anomaly file, and the application psychology has not been negatively impacted); however, as a 211 medical university, clinical medicine, pharmacy, nursing, etc., are its traditional advantageous directions, with sustained appeal to medical candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine has been consistently rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, nursing is rated as 'recommended', and the overall medical category remains highly popular; the number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing has grown from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, an increase of about 41%, and the total number of candidates for the 2026 national college entrance examination in Chongqing is about 209,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, approximately 137,000 people, still at a high level, with no reduction in competitive pressure; in terms of provincial control lines, the Chongqing Physics Category undergraduate batch has dropped from 446 points in 2021 to 425 points in 2025, a slight decrease, but the ranking competition has not eased due to the score line reduction; Tianjin Medical University is located in Tianjin, and Chongqing candidates are applying across provinces, with no local regional preference advantage; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing is only 12 students, with a small scale, making ranking fluctuations sensitive to small plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (accelerated in the last 3 years), the enrollment plan unchanged for 6 consecutive years, the sustained high number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing, and the persistently high social popularity of medical majors, the lowest admission ranking for this university in Chongqing Physics Category in 2026 is expected to continue shifting backward from the 2025 baseline of 14,988; the predicted lowest ranking is about 15,188, with a range of 14,688–15,688.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine
- Ophthalmology and Optometry Medicine
- Anesthesiology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Pharmacy Categories (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Clinical Pharmacy)
- Medical Imaging Technology
- Medical Laboratory Technology
- Preventive Medicine.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For predicted rankings in the range of 14,688–15,688, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Pharmacy Categories, Medical Technology Categories, Preventive Medicine) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 5+3, Clinical Medicine, Ophthalmology and Optometry Medicine, Anesthesiology) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Nursing as a safe fallback. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 14,688), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 15,688), it is recommended to mainly target Tier 2 majors with Nursing as a fallback.
